Video.summary: A creative learning series teaching you how to use AI as a creative partner.
Video.title: Sugar & Her Bot: Episode One

Image.alt: Sugar & Her Bot: Episode One
Sugar & Her Bot: Episode One

Video.summary: Baking has been practised for thousands of years. As well as being a domestic practise it is now a huge commercial industry with celebrity chefs and programmes dedicated to baking! Learn the most basic step by step bread and cake recipes and then move on to more advance techiniques to make delicious cakes, plus biscuits and desserts. Recipes featured include Cinnamon Rolls, Lemon Cream Cheesecake, Pailted Poppy Seed Loaf, Caramel Slices, Bakewell Tart and Sticky Ginger Cake
Video.title: Great British Baking

Image.alt: Great British Baking
Great British Baking

Video.summary: Explore the mysteries and attraction of the ancient art of Tarot Cards. The cards might be centuries old but can still have an inexplicable power to help answer some of life's most important questions. In this programme we explain how to use the cards, shows the basic meaning of the pack and how to conduct a Tarot card reading. We conduct a reading and we can see for ourselves how to explain the possible card interpretations.
Video.title: An Introduction to Tarot

Image.alt: An Introduction to Tarot
An Introduction to Tarot

Video.summary: Take a tour of the main design factory of Nagpur to learn how the local artisans make beautiful wooden handicrafts.
